gxio_mpipe_context_t Struct Reference
[mPIPE Device API (gxio/mpipe.h)]

A context object used to manage mPIPE hardware resources. More...


Data Fields

int fd
 File descriptor for calling up to Linux (and thus the HV).
int instance
 Corresponding mpipe instance #.
char * mmio_cfg_base
 The VA at which configuration registers are mapped.
char * mmio_fast_base
 The VA at which IDMA, EDMA, and buffer manager are mapped.
gxio_mpipe_rules_stacks_t __stacks
 The "initialized" buffer stacks.

Detailed Description

A context object used to manage mPIPE hardware resources.

Examples:

mpipe/chaining/app.c, mpipe/forward/app.c, mpipe/forward/app_gx8072.c, mpipe/ingress/app.c, mpipe/loopback/app.c, and mpipe/multi_rules/app.c.

Field Documentation

int gxio_mpipe_context_t::fd

File descriptor for calling up to Linux (and thus the HV).

int gxio_mpipe_context_t::instance

Corresponding mpipe instance #.

char* gxio_mpipe_context_t::mmio_cfg_base

The VA at which configuration registers are mapped.

char* gxio_mpipe_context_t::mmio_fast_base

The VA at which IDMA, EDMA, and buffer manager are mapped.

gxio_mpipe_rules_stacks_t gxio_mpipe_context_t::__stacks

The "initialized" buffer stacks.
